---
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: standalone
---

```{mermaid}
stateDiagram-v2
    direction LR

    state "No dependency (0)" as S0
    state "Mild dependency (1)" as S1
    state "Moderate dependency (2)" as S2
    state "Severe dependency (3)" as S3

    S0 --> S1
    S1 --> S2
    S2 --> S3
    S0 --> S2
    S1 --> S3
    S0 --> S3
```
